title: Iran launches retaliatory strikes on Israel and U.S. assets after security chief Larijani is killed
summary_full: Iran has intensified attacks targeting U.S. assets in the Middle East and Israel in apparent retaliation against the killing of Iran's security chief Ali Larijani.
summary_public: Iran has intensified attacks targeting U.S. assets in the Middle East and Israel in apparent retaliation against the killing of Iran's security chief Ali Larijani.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Iran launches retaliatory strikes on Israel

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran launches retaliatory strikes on Israel
